source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Advanced Intel
upgrades.description: Allows long range targeting of Bloons in radius of your other towers.

upgrades.name: Submerge and Support
upgrades.description: Adds Submerge targeting option that permanently reveals Camo Bloons in its radius but does not attack while submerged.

upgrades.name: Bloontonium Reactor
upgrades.description: Submerge to detect Camo, pop Bloons and reduce ability cooldowns of nearby water-based Monkeys by 15%.

upgrades.name: Energizer
upgrades.description: Reduces ability cooldowns everywhere by 20% and by 40% for Water based Monkeys. While in radius, Heroes earn XP 50% faster.

upgrades.name: Barbed Darts
upgrades.description: Sub's darts can pop an additional 3 Bloons. Enhances pierce of other weapons.

upgrades.name: Heat-tipped Darts
upgrades.description: Heat tipped darts allow the Monkey Sub to pop Frozen and Lead Bloons.

upgrades.name: Ballistic Missile
upgrades.description: Fires missiles at targets within range. Missiles fly over walls and deal extra damage to MOABs and Ceramics.

upgrades.name: First Strike Capability
upgrades.description: First Strike Ability: A devastating missile strike targeting the largest Bloon on screen, plus splash damage.

upgrades.name: Pre-emptive Strike
upgrades.description: Automatically triggers a powerful missile attack whenever MOAB-Class Bloon spawns from the Bloon entrance.

upgrades.name: Twin Guns
upgrades.description: Added twin gun doubles attack speed, and enhances attack speed of other weapons.

upgrades.name: Airburst Darts
upgrades.description: Airburst darts split into 3 on impact for massive popping power.

upgrades.name: Triple Guns
upgrades.description: Adds a third gun for even faster firing.

upgrades.name: Armor Piercing Darts
upgrades.description: Special AP darts gain increased damage and popping power, plus additional damage to Fortified and MOAB class Bloons.

upgrades.name: Sub Commander
upgrades.description: Adds extra pierce and damage to Commander and all Subs in its radius.
